codeReview.summary: Pass. The fix commit addresses the prior blocking failures from both reviewed features: market-maker-test now uses a separate taker account and verifies actual fill quantity, buy-simulation reports verified fill data via trade events/balance delta, and the indexer REST fallback now includes global transaction polling with contract-event filtering and deduplication beyond contract-account polling.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill still mandates strict tests-first TDD, but this fix transcript again shows implementation edits before tests were added. This suggests a recurring mismatch between documented procedure and real workflow for integration-script/indexer fixes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md step 3 requires "Write tests FIRST"; transcript skeleton for workerSessionId 349b8529-4012-4060-b944-b3046b4f44e1 shows many Edit calls on scripts/src/market-maker-test.ts, scripts/src/buy-simulation.ts, and api/src/indexer/event-indexer.ts before adding tests in api/src/indexer/event-indexer.test.ts.

summary: PASS — The rerun fix resolves the previously blocking scrutiny findings: separate maker/taker flow is implemented in market-maker-test, fill verification is now based on trade evidence/balance deltas (not tx success alone), and testnet REST indexing is broadened to include global user-submitted transactions with deduplication.
